notes: v39.3.15 loot/economy balance pass: centralizes tuning in economyBalance, raises early GLD reliability for priced BSC chests, slows XP level pacing slightly after exploration rewards, retunes chest prices/reward values by rarity, strengthens RAR/CRS high-value contracts, and adjusts casino stakes/payouts without adding new systems or reward types
